tool_schema.name: rg_search
tool_schema.description: Read-only literal ripgrep search over a repository-relative path.

path_policy: POSIX-style relative repository paths only; dot segments are normalized, and absolute paths, parent escapes, repo-external resolutions, and symlink escapes are treated as out of scope.
flag_policy: Authority-bearing flags are deny-by-default. Only trusted task metadata may enable hidden or ignore-bypass search.
